description: Shared-asset single-source manifest between Alembic (main) and AlembicPlugin (sibling). Consumed by scripts/check-shared-asset-drift.mjs. Edit-in-authority-then-sync; see AGENTS.md '共享资产单源与漂移门禁'.

assets.authority: shared sections: main; host sections: each host
assets.notes: Frontmatter description, envelope-vs-structuredContent prerequisite, alembic_knowledge_lifecycle references are intentional host divergence (tool contract; alembic_enrich_candidates was deleted in the Train B DCR wave). Gate compares wakeflow-shared sections only.

assets.authority: shared sections: main; host sections: each host
assets.notes: Main MCP exposes alembic_guard; plugin exposes alembic_code_guard with files/code/workRef scopes (RC0-verified). Tool-contract sections must never be merged.

assets.authority: shared sections: main; host sections: each host
assets.notes: Search-mode description and Guard tool naming are host-specific; plugin-only alembic_prime / alembic_codex_* guidance stays as plugin host overlay.

assets.authority: shared sections: main; host sections: each host
assets.notes: Plugin-only source-graph guidance (alembic_source_graph_status / alembic_code_explore / alembic_symbol_search) stays as plugin host overlay between shared regions.
Intentional scope gap: plugin skill registry hardcodes the other 4 skills (AlembicPlugin lib/.../ProjectSkillService.ts). Gate fails if an undeclared copy appears on the plugin side.
Plugin has no instructions injection registry; main-only by design.

variants.mainLine: description: "外部宿主 Agent（例如 Codex 插件）"
description: "Alembic 内置 AI Agent（Dashboard 对话 / 程序化调用）"
variants.pluginLine: description: "宿主管理的对话式执行者（程序化 / admin 工作流）"

assets.notes: Role ids and permission sets are shared; display name/description per host. Mapping table recorded in AGENTS.md. Any other line difference is drift.
Plugin-as-guest design: the host injects provider config, so the top-level ai block exists only in main. Everything else must deep-equal.
README mode-routed-search wording backported from plugin 2026-06-12 (RC5 p1); files must match exactly except the declared _template.md heading variant.
